title: Fix build pipeline, start script, .npmignore, and npm publish
description: Fix build scripts, update start to serve client + API, create .npmignore, npm publish.

scope.in: Fix build scripts (remove build:cli), update start script to serve built client as static files + API, create .npmignore, update files array, npm publish --dry-run then npm publish.

tasks.title: Fix build scripts and start command

dod.criterion: package.json build script works without build:cli
server/index.ts serves dist/ as static files (express.static or equivalent) when dist/ exists
npm run build && npm start successfully serves the game UI + API
.npmignore exists excluding: src/, server/, .context/, scripts/, public/assets/, *.png, test fixtures, dev configs
package.json files array includes only: dist/, dist-server/, cli/templates/, .claude/skills/, LICENSE, README.md
npm pack --dry-run shows only intended files
npm publish --dry-run succeeds with correct package contents
npm publish succeeds (v0.1.0 on npm registry)
